### Checklist
- [ ] The repo is **public** and **installable** (`npx skills add …` or `/plugin marketplace add …`) with at least one `SKILL.md`.
- [ ] It's about **motion graphics / animation / video**.
- [ ] Entry follows the format: `- [name](url) — one line. *(N skills)*`
- [ ] Placed **alphabetically** within its section.
- [ ] Link points to the repo / skill folder, not a marketing landing page.
